title: Changing item dates within the timeline widget

posts.author: Gurrier (Gareth)
posts.cookedHtml: I use the timeline widget to track events accross different rooms in our facility. I have a couple of staff who need to be able to change dates of these bookings within the main table. Within the timeline view, when you’re scrolling through time with full permissions, if you accidently click and drag on an event whilst dragging through the timeline, it changes the date of that item. We keep doing this accidently and putting events in the wrong rooms/date. This is made worse by the fact that if you change an item date within the timeline view, it doesnt record this in board activity, so its extremely difficult to know its happened. We have absolutely no need to change item dates within the timeline view, it should all be done on the main board. Please can this be fixed/a way to turn this off.
